title: Payment System Architecture for Multi-Module Platforms
excerpt: When multiple booking modules share a platform, payment cannot live inside any one of them. It must be extracted, made generic, and governed by a single contract. Here is how.

title: "Staging Intelligence: A Dramaturgical Framework for Designing Edge-Native Agentic Systems"
excerpt: "Agent systems are better understood as staged plays — with worlds, characters, acts, and controlled improvisation — than as traditional workflows. The Lead's master's thesis."

title: Domain Modeling Is Not Diagramming
excerpt: Most teams confuse domain modeling with drawing boxes and arrows. A domain model is not a diagram — it is an understanding.
